result:
`make` built cleanly and `src/redis-server` exists with a fresh timestamp, confirming the full rebuild succeeded.

Summary of changes:
- Added `robj *lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(robj *key, client *c, robj *reply)` in `src/db.c` (same body as before, just reordered params) and declared it in `src/server.h`.
- Migrated all 34 call sites across `geo.c`, `t_stream.c`, `t_array.c`, `t_set.c`, `t_list.c`, `t_string.c`, `bitops.c`, `t_hash.c`, `t_zset.c` to the new function with swapped argument order.
- Removed the old `lookupKeyReadOrReply` declaration/definition; confirmed no remaining references to the old name anywhere in the repo.
